metadata.desc: OpenViking long-term memory for AstrBot — auto-capture conversations, semantic recall, and cross-venue memory isolation.

ov_admin_api_key.description: Admin API key (only used to create venue users on first encounter)

ov_account_id.description: OV account ID (leave empty to auto-parse from API key)

isolation_mode.description: Memory isolation: venue_user (per-group/DM, default) | venue_user_fanout (cross-venue sharing) | global_user (single user)

isolation_overrides.description: Per-group isolation mode overrides as JSON, e.g. {"123456": "venue_user_fanout"}

global_user_id.description: OV user ID used in global_user mode

auto_recall_enabled.description: Auto-recall memories on every LLM request

recall_limit.description: Max number of memory entries to recall

recall_min_score.description: Minimum semantic score threshold for recall

recall_token_budget.description: Max tokens for injected recall context

commit_message_threshold.description: Auto-commit after this many pending messages

commit_token_threshold.description: Auto-commit when pending tokens exceed this

commit_idle_seconds.description: Auto-commit after this many seconds of inactivity

ingest_attachments.description: Push images/files to OV resources for VLM indexing

fanout_member_cache_ttl_seconds.description: TTL for cached group member lists (fanout mode)

backfill_on_first_seen.description: Pull historical messages when a venue is first seen

backfill_max_messages.description: Max messages to backfill per venue

backfill_max_age_days.description: Only backfill messages from the last N days

backfill_batch_size.description: Messages per batch when writing backfill to OV

bypass_patterns.description: Regex patterns to skip OV operations for matching venue IDs
